description.value:
Receive Prescription processing script5-stop building blocks for patient J. de XXX_Luzac
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_afhandelen_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: KWAL script 5 Stop Kwalificatie script 5 - stop: afhandelen medicatievoorschrift met een stop afspraak.Let op: kwalificatie script 5 nodig.
Receive Prescription processing script5-stop resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '611662')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '15814')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '38644')))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '611662|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (TEMAZEPAM AUROBINDO CAPSULE 20MG)
